steps: Add protease inhibitor tablet (1 tablet/ 10 mL ) (complete EDTA free).
Add amount of reagent to each sample and transfer to bead beating tube.
Homogenize tissue sample in bead beater (see protocol in notebook), speed 3; let samples sit On ice for 10- 00:15:00 after to settle.
Centrifuge homogenized sample at 10000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 .
